steps.name: Hook system with register and dispatch
criteria: HookRegistry stores named hooks with callbacks
register_hook adds a callback to a named hook
dispatch_hook calls all callbacks for a hook name
Callbacks receive arguments and return values
Unregister removes a specific callback by ID

steps.name: Hook primitives in Lisp bridge
criteria: add-hook primitive registers a Lisp callback
Hooks callable from Rust via dispatch
Hook callbacks receive Lisp value arguments
Hook errors display as messages not crashes
define-hook primitive creates a named hook

steps.name: Gutter rendering area in TUI renderer
criteria: Renderer reserves gutter columns on the left
Gutter width controlled by viewport gutter_width
Buffer text shifts right by gutter width
Gutter area displays content from render-gutter hook
Zero gutter width renders without gutter

steps.name: Line numbers plugin in Alfred Lisp
criteria: Plugin in plugins/line-numbers/init.lisp loads
Line numbers appear in gutter column
Numbers update correctly when scrolling
Gutter width adjusts for digit count
Removing plugin directory causes no errors
